expertise: Every topic has three angles: Challenger disrupts beliefs, Architect reveals structural logic, Closer drives action. Best scripts serve one angle completely. Mixing reduces conversion by 23%.
First 3 seconds determine 60% of watch time. Hook must create knowledge gap. Questions create weak gaps. Surprising statements create strong gaps. Demonstrations create strongest gaps.
